title: Ember Carbon Intensity Yearly API
description:
Get grid carbon intensity data at a yearly grain.
    e.g.

`https://api.ember-energy.org/v1/carbon-intensity/yearly?entity_code=AFG,BRA,DEU,ZAF&start_date=2020&api_key=MY_API_KEY`
    

The methodology of this dataset can be found on its [dataset page](https://ember-energy.org/data/yearly-electricity-data/)
    within the 'Methodology - Ember Electricity Data' pdf.
